summary: Replayed ADR 0290 from committed release candidate 0.177.114 on the latest realistic `origin/main` baseline by running the governed Redpanda live-apply wrapper on docker-runtime-lv3, advancing the platform baseline to 0.130.75 and re-verifying the private Kafka, Admin API, HTTP Proxy, Schema Registry, and smoke-topic contract from the exact-main tree.

verification.check: Exact-main release readiness snapshot and dry run
verification.observed: `LV3_SKIP_OUTLINE_SYNC=1 uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/release_manager.py status --json` plus the release dry run completed from the latest realistic `origin/main` baseline and are preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0290-mainline-release-status-r1.json` and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0290-mainline-release-dry-run-r1.txt`.

`LV3_SKIP_OUTLINE_SYNC=1 uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/release_manager.py --bump patch ...` prepared release `0.177.114` and platform version `0.130.75`; the transcript is preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0290-mainline-release-write-r1.txt`.

verification.check: Governed exact-main Redpanda replay from committed source
verification.observed: `ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true make live-apply-service service=redpanda env=production` succeeded from committed source `aafea88c9bee78e14372f40b94bc62d3abb79433` with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=176 changed=4 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=49 rescued=0 ignored=0`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0290-mainline-live-apply-r1-0.177.114.txt`.

`receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0290-mainline-runtime-health-r1.json` confirms `GET /v1/status/ready` returned `200`, HTTP Proxy produce and readback succeeded with the smoke marker present, Schema Registry returned the declared subject `platform.redpanda.smoke-value`, the `lv3-redpanda` and `redpanda-openbao-agent` containers were healthy, listeners were bound on `9092`, `9644`, `8103`, and `8104`, and `rpk topic list` contained both `platform.redpanda.smoke` and `platform.redpanda.smoke.dlq`.

`uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python -m pytest -q tests/test_redpanda_runtime_role.py tests/test_redpanda_playbook.py tests/test_generate_platform_vars.py tests/test_ansible_role_idempotency.py` returned `47 passed in 11.30s`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0290-mainline-targeted-checks-r2-0.177.114.txt`.
`make syntax-check-redpanda` passed from the release tree and is preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0290-mainline-syntax-check-r1-0.177.114.txt`.

verification.check: Exact-main validation repairs outside the Redpanda runtime
verification.observed: The first validation passes preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0290-mainline-validate-r1-0.177.114.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0290-mainline-validate-r2-0.177.114.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0290-mainline-validate-r3-0.177.114.txt`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0290-mainline-validate-r4-0.177.114.txt` exposed two exact-main repo-only gaps: `config/ansible-role-idempotency.yml` was missing `redpanda_runtime`, and the generated dependency graph was stale after expanding the workstream ownership manifest. The final tree now carries the idempotency policy repair, explicit `tests/test_ansible_role_idempotency.py` coverage, the expanded `ws-0290-live-apply` shared-surface contract, and refreshed generated status, diagram, manifest, and ops-portal surfaces.

verification.check: Final exact-main repository automation and validation bundle
verification.observed: `make check-build-server`, `make validate`, `make remote-validate`, and `make pre-push-gate` all passed from the exact-main branch tip, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0290-mainline-check-build-server-r1-0.177.114.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0290-mainline-validate-r5-0.177.114.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0290-mainline-remote-validate-r1-0.177.114.txt`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0290-mainline-pre-push-gate-r1-0.177.114.txt`.

`LV3_SNAPSHOT_BRANCH=main ./scripts/validate_repo.sh workstream-surfaces generated-docs generated-portals agent-standards`, `python3 scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate`, and `git diff --check` all passed after moving `ws-0290-live-apply` to `live_applied`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0290-mainline-main-candidate-validation-r2-0.177.114.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0290-mainline-live-apply-receipts-validate-r2-0.177.114.txt`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0290-mainline-git-diff-check-r2-0.177.114.txt`.

notes: This receipt is the canonical exact-main proof for ADR 0290 from committed release candidate 0.177.114.

The governed Redpanda replay itself ran from committed source `aafea88c9bee78e14372f40b94bc62d3abb79433`; later branch changes after that replay were repo-only closeout for validation contracts, generated docs, and audit surfaces, and did not change the Redpanda runtime contract applied on docker-runtime-lv3.
The exact-main replay also exercised a real Docker recovery branch: the wrapper restarted Docker when required bridge chains were missing before Redpanda converged successfully.
Platform version advances to 0.130.75 because this exact-main replay is the first verified live introduction of ADR 0290 rather than a re-verification of an already-live capability.
